entries.title: Navigation admin index.
entries.notes: Capture after installing capell-app/navigation in the isolated demo harness and seeding the data required for this use case.
entries.useCase: An editor reviews site navigation records and their scope/status.

entries.title: Create/edit navigation form.
entries.notes: Capture after installing capell-app/navigation in the isolated demo harness and seeding the data required for this use case.
entries.useCase: An editor builds a navigation tree with links, page references, headings, and nested items.

entries.title: Site relation manager for navigations.
entries.notes: Capture after installing capell-app/navigation in the isolated demo harness and seeding the data required for this use case.
entries.useCase: An editor manages navigations directly from the site edit surface.

entries.title: Page form navigation tab.
entries.notes: Capture after installing capell-app/navigation in the isolated demo harness and seeding the data required for this use case.
entries.useCase: An editor controls page-level navigation metadata from the page form.

entries.title: Frontend menu output.
entries.notes: Capture after installing capell-app/navigation in the isolated demo harness and seeding the data required for this use case.
entries.useCase: An anonymous visitor sees the seeded public menu without internal page IDs or editor metadata.
